title: Research Hypothesis
description: A testable hypothesis generated from a research brief.

brief_id.description: ID of the parent research brief this hypothesis belongs to.

client_id.description: Client this hypothesis is associated with.

hypothesis.description: The testable hypothesis statement (If X, then Y, because Z).

rationale.description: Why this hypothesis is worth testing — supporting reasoning or prior evidence.

metrics.description: Measurable success metrics that will confirm or reject this hypothesis.

created.description: ISO 8601 date the hypothesis was created (YYYY-MM-DD).
